title: SkillFrontmatter
description: Frontmatter schema for skill files under skills/. Aligned with the convention in skills/dotnet-test/SKILL.md and skills/dotnet-architecture/SKILL.md.

name.description: Kebab-case skill identifier. MUST equal the enclosing folder name.

description.description: One paragraph stating when to invoke and scope boundaries. English only.

allowed-tools.description: Comma-separated allowlist of tools the skill may use at runtime.

user-invocable.description: If true, the skill can be invoked directly via slash-command; if false, only through an agent.

examples.name: dotnet-test-api
examples.description: Creates and maintains a <Solution>.ApiTests project for external API integration tests using xUnit + Flurl.Http + FluentAssertions with a shared IAsyncLifetime fixture. Generic JWT Bearer default; NAuth/OAuth2/API-key presets documented. Not for unit tests (use dotnet-test).
examples.allowed-tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, Write, Edit, Task
